title: Tell the World I Love You
original_title: บอกโลกให้รู้ว่า "กูรักมึง"
overview: Keng, a young boy who left his hometown to study in Bangkok and lives with Tai, a friend who is the same age as him. Keng's dream is to pursue further study in China in order to look for his mom whom he was separated.
